reasoning: Market analyst reports a confirmed breakout above the 20-day range high on rising volume; RSI at 61 leaves room before overbought. News sentiment is net positive on ETF inflow headlines. Fundamentals neutral. Bear case (macro tightening) was argued but judged weaker over the 1-3 day horizon. Long with a 2% stop below breakout level and 4% target.

market.summary: Breakout above 20-day range high on 1.8x average volume; RSI 61; MACD positive crossover.

news.summary: Net positive sentiment driven by ETF inflow coverage; no adverse regulatory headlines in 24h window.

fundamental.summary: On-chain activity flat week-over-week; funding rates near neutral; no supply-side events.

debate_summary: Bull: momentum breakout with volume confirmation and supportive flows. Bear: macro tightening risk and thin holiday liquidity. Judge: bull case stronger for a short-horizon long with tight stop; bear risks bounded by exchange-resident stop-loss.
